sections.paragraph:
Original: מתוּשׁלח

Transliteration: methûshelach

Phonetic: meth-oo-sheh'-lakh

BDB Definition:

Methuselah = "man of the dart"
  1. son of Enoch, 6th in descent from Seth, and father of Lamech

Origin: from H4962 and H7973

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
